ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the location above sea level */,
  "nearest_city" TEXT /* Nearest city to the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the location data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Exact date of data collection */,
  "time" TEXT /* Exact time of data collection */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year (e.g., January, February, etc.) */,
  "wind_speed" TEXT /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "wind_type" TEXT /* Type of wind (e.g., fresh breeze, moderate breeze, etc.) */,
  "sea_conditions" TEXT /* Description of sea conditions */,
  "wave_height" TEXT /* Height of waves in meters */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" TEXT /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "cloud_coverage" TEXT /* Description of cloud coverage */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the weather data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Country where the location is situated
Elevation of the location above sea level
Last time the location data was updated
Unique identifier for each weather data record
Reference to the location where the data was collected
Month of the year (e.g., January, February, etc.)
Type of wind (e.g., fresh breeze, moderate breeze, etc.)
Last time the weather data was updated
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Date and time the user account was created
Date and time the user last logged in
Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, pending)
